name: Expertise
entries: Expertise is a feature that enhances your use of a skill proficiency. When you make an ability check with a skill proficiency in which you have Expertise, your {@variantrule Proficiency|XPHB|Proficiency Bonus} is doubled for that check unless the bonus is doubled by another feature.
If you gain Expertise, you gain it in one {@variantrule skill|XPHB} in which you have proficiency. You can't have Expertise in the same skill proficiency more than once.
